description: Smart flip flops from lotto for the out-of-the-box thinker. These flip flops, inspired with Op Art era, can be worn with jeans or bermudas. Upper Rubber thong style straps with stitch detailing, rubber lining and embroidered branding Soft and cushioned PU footbed with print for comfort and style Outsole TPU outsole with branding and patterned lugs for grip and traction Slipper care Rub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
